remarks: Perfectly positioned in the heart of town & just a short walk from train, park and schools, Douglas Road is an extraordinary home built by Cognetta Homes. Thoughtfully designed to blend timeless craftsmanship with modern luxury. Offering over 7000 sq. ft. on four beautifully finished levels, this stunning residence features 6 bedrooms, 6 baths & a light-filled floor plan that seamlessly connects elegant interior spaces with outdoor living. Designed for both sophisticated entertaining & comfortable everyday living, the home showcases premium finishes, generous proportions with meticulous attention to detail throughout. At the heart of the home is a spectacular chef's kitchen featuring Wolf and Sub-Zero appliances, custom cabinetry, a spacious walk-in pantry & an adjoining dining area complete with a butler's station & wine bar. A dramatic floating staircase serves as a striking architectural focal point, while the glass-enclosed office provides an inspiring, private workspace. The luxurious primary suite offers a true retreat, highlighted by a spa-inspired bath with radiant heated floors. Abundance of light with impressing soaring ceilings on the third level & a finished lower level featureing a gym, spacious game room, lounge area, a private bedroom with full bath-ideal for guests, a home office & a playroom creating the perfect space for an au pair, or a sixth bedroom. One of a kind, luxury home in one of the area's most desirable locations with sidewalks to town and school
